name: NTT
label: Algorithm 9

inputs.name: f
inputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing coefficients of input polynomial

outputs.name: f_hat
outputs.description: 256-element array modulo q representing NTT of the input polynomial

body_raw: for (j <- start; j < start + len; j++)
f_hat[j + len] <- f_hat[j] - t mod q
